sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100529" key="sunhliki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνηλῐκί-α</orth>, poet. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνηλῐκι-ίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n100529.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">body of comrades</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">playmates, Supp. Epigr.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:6:140:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.140.22</biblScope> </bibl> (Phrygia, <date TEIform="date">iv A.D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
